nameMeanings.name: ORTI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito.
patronymic or plural form of the personal name Roto, from ancient Germanic Hrotho, from hroth ‘fame, glory’.

variants.name: Rotolo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Rocco, Sal, Santo, Carlo, Carmine, Domenic, Elio, Gaspare, Giustino.

from rotolo, a measure of weight roughly equivalent to 800 grams, which remained in use in southern Italy until the end of the 19th century. The surname presumably arose from a metonymic occupational name.

variants.name: Rotello
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Rotello, a pet form of Roto (see Roti ).

variants.name: Rota
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Amedio, Antonio, Carmela, Gilda, Natale, Pasquale, Valentino.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name Buonarrota, Buonarroto, an omen or well-wishing name meaning ‘good addition’.
Italian: from rota ‘wheel’, used as a metonymic occupational name for maker of wheels and the like or perhaps as a nickname for a short, fat person.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: LORTY
meanings: A female name corrupted from Charlotte.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs E William LORTY ORTI was born about 1180. She had at least 1 son with E William LORTY ORTI.
